violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3-bay sink to sanitize dishes. Service to be called to repair dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The prep sink was observed leaking at the time of inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Bathroom doors that open up to the kitchen or any food prep areas must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
